prompt: A realistic travel photo taken with an iPhone 16 Pro, vertical 9:16. A 22-year-old young Chinese woman standing by the shore of Erhai Lake in Yunnan, with Cangshan Mountain in the background, full-body shot, wide-angle lens, slightly low angle. Oval face, standard Oriental proportions, fair and delicate skin, translucent and hydrated skin with natural luster, petite and youthful, perfect figure, moderate bust, natural waist-to-hip ratio, long legs, slender fingers, innocent and seductive style, full of idol presence. Long straight black hair naturally draped, soft and fluffy, blown by the sea breeze, a few strands lightly touching the cheeks, creating a natural airy feel. Makeup, hairstyle, hair color, movements, and camera angles are kept natural and random, making each photo look slightly different, like a real travel record. She is wearing light blue Wei-Jin style cross-collar Hanfu blended with modern fairy-style Lolita fashion, an original niche brand design, paired with Chinese-style hairpins, ribbons, and bow elements, light and elegant, with unified colors, full of ethereal charm. Natural side-backlighting, slightly overexposed, real mobile HDR, slight lens flare, real dynamic range, no signs of retouching, obvious aerial perspective, a snapshot moment, strong sense of daily life, real photography. Photorealistic, iPhone photography, RAW, ultra detailed, cinematic lighting, realistic skin texture, masterpiece.
